rationale: We must delete duplicate lines not associated with tasks. Another duplicate with the same short description is row EXP-35319670314; selecting it lets us delete both non-task duplicates together.

action_text: Choose "Delete" from the Actions on selected rows menu
rationale: Proceed to remove the currently selected duplicate row(s). This executes the required deletion step.
Showing per-column search fields would let us quickly filter Source ID to "User: ..." and isolate non-task entries, reducing the chance of deleting a task-linked line.

action_text: Open the "Short description" column options menu
rationale: Opening the Short description column options may provide grouping or show-matching tools to identify duplicates more reliably before deletion.
Previewing the duplicate row’s details verifies it isn’t associated with a task before deletion, preventing mistakes.
